hooks.command: SAFE_WRAPPER_ACTION='SessionStart housekeeping' SAFE_WRAPPER_REASON='初始化日志目录并清理 30 天前日志' SAFE_WRAPPER_ROLLBACK='n/a' bash shared/bin/safe-wrapper.sh "find logs/ -name '*.md' -type f -mtime +30 -delete"

SAFE_WRAPPER_ACTION='SessionStop notification' SAFE_WRAPPER_REASON='发送 Claude Code 完成通知' SAFE_WRAPPER_ROLLBACK='n/a' bash shared/bin/safe-wrapper.sh "command -v osascript >/dev/null 2>&1 && osascript -e 'display notification \"Claude Code task finished\" with title \"Claude Code\"' || true"
